query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS me_metrics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('output', 'outcome', 'impact') NOT NULL,
  target_value DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  current_value DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  unit VARCHAR(50),
  frequency ENUM('daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annual') NOT NULL,
  last_updated DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  trend ENUM('up', 'down', 'stable') DEFAULT 'stable',
  status ENUM('on_track', 'at_risk', 'off_track') DEFAULT 'on_track',
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS me_indicators (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  metric_id INT NOT NULL,
  period VARCHAR(20),
  value DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  recorded_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  recorded_by INT,
  INDEX idx_metric (metric_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS me_indicators (
